scores.correctness_notes: Basic structure is correct (temp_model, deploy, wait), but the agent incorrectly states that jubilant.all_active checks both active AND idle — gold standard says all_active only checks active workload status, and all_agents_idle is a separate function for checking agent idle state.
scores.hallucination_notes: Two issues: (1) agent states 'jubilant.all_active checks every unit's workload status is active AND every agent is idle' — this is wrong, all_active only checks active status per gold standard; (2) 'default wait_timeout is 180 seconds' and 'wait_timeout on the Juju() constructor' are not confirmed in gold standard (gold standard mentions timeout on wait() call but not the constructor parameter name or the 180s default value).
